spec.name: Soul Ward Sphere
spec.summary: establishes soul energy in a spherical envelope by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that establishes soul energy in a spherical envelope by changing existing conditions. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: permanent.
